Heybike is offering a special flash sale on its new Villain Electric Dirt Bike that comes with $150 in FREE gear at $1,199 shipped, after using the exclusive bonus savings code ELECTREK at checkout. This new ride launched at the end of January with a $1,499 MSRP that was cut down to $1,299 using our exclusive code. Now, during this flash sale event, you’re getting an even larger $300 combined markdown off the going rate – plus, you’re getting the additional $150 in free gear (a cycling bag and gloves) for the best price and best bundle deal yet. Head below to learn more about it. You can also find a number of the brand’s alternate e-bike models with up to $800 spring savings starting from $999.

items.title: Save up to 54% on Jackery power stations and solar bundles during its Earth Day Sale – deals start from $99
items.summary:
Jackery is celebrating the rock we all call home with its Earth Day Sale and up to 54% power station discounts. One of the best picks for folks during this event who want an easier-to-manage solution is the newest Jackery Explorer 1500 Ultra Portable Power Station down at $999 shipped, which happens to match the deal we’re also seeing at Amazon right now. It’s dropping down from a $1,299 full price, which we last featured when it fell to the $899 low at the end of March in the brand’s expanded/extended spring sale lineup. It popped back up to this second-lowest rate during the previous Easter Sale, and is continuing the $400 markdown in this new event. If you want to save a bit more money while gaining much of the same backup power support, you can also find the Explorer 1500 v2 power station at $699 shipped during this sale. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals while they last.

more…

items.title: Microsoft is officially killing its Outlook Lite app next month
items.summary: Launched in 2022, Outlook Lite is a lightweight version of the regular Outlook app, designed for Android phones with limited storage and regions with slower internet connections. The app had already been scheduled for retirement.

items.title: Trade traffic for fresher air during Lectric’s Earth Day e-bike sale and get up to $694 savings – all starting from $799
items.summary:
Lectric has changed gears with its Earth Day Sale, which is seeing up to $694 in savings (including XPeak2 price cuts) on its popular e-bike bundles, like my favorite, the XP4 750 Folding Utility e-bike with a FREE $439 bundle of gear at $1,299 shipped, though you can also find the standard XP4 e-bikes with a $79 bundle at $999 shipped. If it weren’t for the discounts on the bundles, the long-range 750 packages would run you $1,738 at full price, but you’re getting a LevelUp cargo rack, Elite headlight, suspension seat post, a 1.5-liter top tube bag, bottle holder, phone mount, and accordion folding bike lock all for free. You can learn why the 750 model is my go-to ride around Brooklyn in my hands-on review here, and be sure to head below to browse the entire lineup of offers while they last.

more…

items.title: Rare deal drops Belkin’s UltraCharge Pro 25W foldable MagSafe stand to new Amazon low
items.summary:
Deals on the latest slate of 25W Qi2 Belkin MagSafe charging stands have been very hard to come by. There have been a few chances to save on select models, but discounts have, nonetheless, been very rare. Today, however, Amazon is offering the latest Belkin UltraCharge Pro 2-in-1 Convertible Magnetic Charger with Qi2 25W at a new $79.99 all-time low.
